articles.author: Sahil Kapur, Brennan Leach, Fiona Glisson, Ryan Nobles
articles.title: Senate Republicans splinter over SAVE America Act's path as Trump calls for more revisions - NBC News
articles.description: The prospects for President Donald Trump’s SAVE America Act grew murkier as divisions deepened among Senate Republicans about how to pass it.
articles.content: WASHINGTON The prospects for President Donald Trumps SAVE America Act grew murkier Monday as divisions deepened among Senate Republicans about how to pass it and whether it's possible to overcome Dem… [+5453 chars]
